original_image_tags: The document is a single page, a carbon copy or scan of a typewritten memorandum. The paper is aged, yellowed, and shows faint bleed-through text from the reverse side, which appears to be a different document. The text is slightly skewed. At the bottom right, there is a faint "EX-118" stamp and some handwritten initials, possibly "D.O.". A prominent, inverted blue stamp is in the lower center.

elements.description: A typed document with text appearing in reverse as a bleed-through from the other side of the page. Visible elements include a header reading 'United States Government', a date 'April 16, 1946', and an upside-down stamped mark at the bottom reading 'RECEIVED MAY 2 11 47 AM '46 INTERNAL SECURITY FBI' followed by 'EX-118'.

judge.reason: Description A states there is an inverted blue stamp and faint 'EX-118' stamp, while Description B quotes specific text ('RECEIVED MAY 2 11 47 AM '46 INTERNAL SECURITY FBI') that A does not mention at all, indicating a factual contradiction or hallucination about the stamp's content.
